name: Emerald Resources Nl
analysis: EMR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.0400, stop A$4.6926, target A$6.7050 (0.49:1) — then trail it.
